summary: End-to-end testing of Vidya AI MVP. All backend endpoints and frontend flows verified working with real LLM integrations (GPT-5.2 for chat/paper, Gemini Nano Banana for diagrams).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router. Although Starlette wraps middleware on first request and this currently works, it is conventional to add middleware before include_router for predictability.
server.py: @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider using lifespan handlers.
server.py: /api/paper/generate falls back to using the entire raw reply as 'paper' when JSON parsing fails - good fallback, but you might log the failure for observability.
server.py: Large image_base64 strings are stored in MongoDB; consider GridFS or object storage for production to keep documents small.
Hardcoded model strings ('gpt-5.2', 'gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview') could be lifted to .env for easier swapping.
seed_data_creation: Tests created 2 chat docs, 1 paper, 1 diagram in MongoDB (non-destructive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints incl. PDF binary check and diagram base64. Frontend flows verified via Playwright: landing -> nav-launch-btn -> /app/chat (sent message, received reply ~304 chars), /app/paper (Generate Question Paper -> preview rendered, Answer Key tab works, Download PDF link present with correct /api/paper/{id}/pdf href), /app/diagram (Generate -> base64 data:image rendered). All data-testids present. Image generation took ~50-60s. Paper generation took ~30s.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All features work as specified.
